content: I have been married to Arjun for 22 years. We had a quiet life. He was stressed lately because of the land dispute with his brother, but he never spoke of violence. On the night of the incident, I returned home from my meditation retreat at 8:00 PM. I prepared dinner, watched TV, and went to bed around 9:15 PM. I woke up at 10:30 PM to a scream. I ran out and found him dead. I did not leave the house after 8 PM. I have no idea who could have done this. The knife is ours — he always kept it in the kitchen drawer. I don’t know anything about the ₹25 lakh transfer. I swear on my children’s lives that I did not see anyone else that night.
